channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: I'm slashing my streaming bills by 56% in 2026 – here's my five-step masterplan
item.description: Five ways to cut the cost of Netflix, Disney+ and more by selectively subscribing and cutting unnecessary options.
item.dc:creator: Carrie Marshall, TechRadar

item.title: The next cyber battlefield: Preparing federal networks for autonomous malware
item.description: The mission for federal defenders is clear: build systems and cultures resilient enough to meet an adversary that learns as fast as it attacks. The post The next cyber battlefield: Preparing federal networks for autonomous malware first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: The Switch 2 has had a brilliant first year, but cracks in performance are already starting to show
item.description: Nintendo’s year was dominated by Switch 2 speculation and the arrival of the system, but there’s plenty more that happened, too.
item.dc:creator: Lloyd Coombes, TechRadar

item.title: How to migrate to a new Windows PC
item.description: It’s great to get a new computer, but it’s not so great to realize that all your stuff is on the old one. You’re in luck, though. It’s easier than ever to transfer your data from an old PC to a new one. We’ve covered multiple ways you can do it, below.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: 5 eye-opening Google Android app tricks from 2025
item.description: We talk about tons of tips for making the most of Android and tapping into all the software’s easily overlooked options, features, and shortcuts. But when it comes to real-world productivity, Google’s actual operating system is really only half the story.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: The DXC program empowering neurodivergent IT pros
item.description: The tech industry stands to gain significant value by tapping into neurodivergent talent. Such professionals can offer fresh perspectives, demonstrate strengths in areas critical to IT, and even have the potential to make teams 30% more productive, according to research from Deloitte.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: How to watch Call the Midwife 2025 Christmas specials online
item.description: With time running out, the Nonnatus head on a rescue mission to Hong Kong. Here's how to watch the Call the Widwife 2025 Christmas specials online anywhere.
item.dc:creator: Tom Wardley, TechRadar

item.title: Virtual reality opens doors for older people to build closer connections in real life
item.description: Many retirement developments serve as a tranquil refuge for older people who can no longer travel to faraway places or engage in bold adventures.
item.dc:creator: Michael Liedtke, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Time to switch to eSIM? South Korea will now make consumers scan their faces to buy a SIM card and cut down on scams
item.description: South Korea now requires facial scans for SIM registration following data breaches which used fraudulently activated mobile phone numbers.
item.dc:creator: Efosa Udinmwen, TechRadar

item.title: New malware can read your chats and steal your money
item.description: New Android banking trojan Sturnus steals credentials, reads encrypted messages and controls devices.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Cameroon vs Gabon Free Streams: How to watch AFCON 2025 Group F opener, TV channels, preview
item.description: We'll show you all the ways you can watch Cameroon vs Gabon in the 2025 AFCON from anywhere in the world.
item.dc:creator: Thomas Shapland, TechRadar

item.title: How a former Forest Service employee changed the future of housing in California
item.description: One April night eight years ago, two tech leaders sat down with a former Forest Service employee at Terroir, a natural wine bar in San Francisco. Then they started sketching out a plan that would eventually reshape California’s housing policy.
item.dc:creator: Adele Peters, Fast Company

item.title: New SantaStealer malware is after your passwords and crypto
item.description: New SantaStealer malware reportedly threatens holiday shoppers with password theft. This Christmas-themed info-stealer targets browsers and crypto wallets.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: US cyber progress isn’t stalled
item.description: Beneath the policy layer, the technical and strategic modernization of U.S. cybersecurity is actually accelerating faster than ever. The post US cyber progress isn’t stalled — it’s evolving first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Sean Davis, Federal News Network

item.title: Bionic hand brings baseball star back to the field
item.description: San Francisco Giants invite Jamie Grohsong to throw ceremonial first pitch at Oracle Park after he learned to play baseball with a bionic hand following an injury.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 8 old programming languages developers won’t quit
item.description: The computer revolution has always been driven by the new and the next. The hype-mongers have trained us to assume that the latest iteration of ideas will be the next great leap forward. Some, though, are quietly stepping off the hype train.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Instagram’s new AI tool lets you control your algorithm
item.description: Instagram's new 'Your Algorithm' tool lets you control your Reels feed in real time. The app now gives you power to customize what videos you see.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
